## Agent or tool

Examples: Codex, Claude, Cursor, custom local agent, other.

## Sanitized folder shape

```text
skills/
  example-skill/
    SKILL.md
```

## Metadata style

```yaml
---
name: Example
description: Example description
---
```

## What should the atlas detect?


## Privacy note

Please keep examples sanitized. Do not paste private skill bodies, secrets, credentials, or full home-directory paths.
